raw_data:
hla Alpha-hemolysin precursor[Staphylococcus aureus subsp. aureus Z172]
Gene ID: 17369140, discontinued on 2-Mar-2015
All Gene records for this genome have been discontinued due to a change in scope for prokaryotic genomes in Gene. At the time this Gene record was discontinued, the RefSeq genome was re-annotated with the following features at this location:
locus_tag: SAZ172_RS06185
protein: WP_000848124.1
location: NC_022604.1 (1227365..1228324, complement)
annotation change: identical gene and protein


There is no table for this gene because it has no annotated transcribed products.
